text:
The 'problematic' youtube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nW3OrLHj0lQ

The 'sample' mkv: https://filesamples.com/samples/video/mkv/sample_1280x720_surfing_with_audio.mkv

Earlier this day Nautilus crashed on this sample mpv too, but when I moved it to another directory I could enter this directory with Nautilus and it showed the thumbnail.
